title: Preserve guidelines during scorecard model retarget
description:
Gherkin:
Given a selected score champion version has guidelines
When scorecard_model_retarget creates a non-champion retargeted ScoreVersion
Then the new ScoreVersion preserves the champion guidelines exactly
And the procedure row records that guidelines were preserved.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Implemented guideline preservation for scorecard_model_retarget: pulled champion guidelines are retained out-of-band during planning and passed to plexus.score.update for each created non-champion ScoreVersion. Added contract assertions and validated with focused tests plus YAML parse.
